sections.title: Purpose
sections.summary: Review player experience with a bias toward the first five minutes, legibility, friction, and flow across desktop and mobile contexts.

sections.title: Responsibilities
sections.summary: - first-session onboarding review - readability and hierarchy review - friction and dead-end detection - feel and feedback review - mobile and small-screen pass - player-flow revie

sections.title: Doctrine
sections.summary: This capability should frequently route through `Kaplan 🎯` and `Miyamoto ✨`. For game products, UX is not a thin visual layer. It is how the player learns to trust the game.

sections.title: Key Question
sections.summary: Where does the player lose understanding, trust, or momentum in the first five minutes?
